Technology: Supabase (RLS, Storage, Branching), Framer Motion, Mapbox, Google Maps API
• Designing and implementing Supabase Row Level Security (RLS) to enforce role-based and tenant-level access

• Led Black Therapy Network, a US-based mental healthcare platform supporting real-time chat, video sessions,
and appointment scheduling for large-scale daily usage
• Integrated on-prem AI inference via third-party backends, eliminating reliance on cloud object storage and cutting
infrastructure costs substantially
• Shipped a calendar and timeline module for a home-building management system, automating scheduling and task
visibility and saving 2–3 hours of manual effort per week
